faqs.question: How much does centipede control cost in East Tremont?
faqs.answer: Centipede control services in East Tremont typically range from $350 to $550, depending on the size of your property, severity of the infestation, and treatment method required. We provide free inspections and upfront pricing before beginning any work.

faqs.question: Why do I have centipedes in my East Tremont apartment or home?
faqs.answer: Centipedes are attracted to moisture, darkness, and the presence of other small insects they feed on. East Tremont's older buildings often have basement moisture issues, cracks in foundations, and gaps around pipes that allow centipedes to enter and thrive indoors.

faqs.question: Are centipedes dangerous to my family or pets?
faqs.answer: While centipedes can bite if threatened, they are generally not dangerous to humans or pets. However, their presence often indicates other pest problems and excess moisture issues that should be addressed to protect your property and health.

faqs.question: How quickly can you provide centipede control service in East Tremont?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service throughout East Tremont and the Bronx. Our technicians will conduct a thorough inspection, identify entry points and conducive conditions, and implement an effective treatment plan to eliminate centipedes from your property quickly.
